notes: Generated with built-in image generation after inspecting the cozy Taco Tiger four-form sheet, the base Shellbreaker Assault Rig horror sprite, the taco chip particle, and the cozy defeat still.

The accepted source sheet is a second generation after rejecting the first for insufficient cutout spacing. It contains six machine-first subjects: four evolution stages, one static breacher discharge munition, and one disabled wreck defeat still.

The prompt explicitly required war machines/robots/vehicles of destruction rather than food, and required the munition to avoid speed lines, trails, directional smear, sparks shooting off, and motion blur.
Background was removed with the imagegen remove_chroma_key.py helper. The transparent alpha scan found exactly six groups, enough to slice cleanly without manual split repair.
